form.div: Action Required: Please provide your comments for this action.

div.style: display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px;

div.h4: 📋 TAR Details (To be approved by lease signatory)

div.style: background-color: #e8f5e8; padding: 15px; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 20px; border-left: 4px solid #27ae60;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 5px;

tr.td: 1 set of all drawings - softcopy in PDF format
Furniture layout plan-with merchandising and services
Photos of previous shops or anything that helps explain the concept

field.name: help
field.p: Get started by creating a new PTL (Permission to Lease) form for tenant management.
